Agentic AI Implementation

Your Competitors Are Already
Running on Autopilot.

Agentic AI doesn't just assist — it acts. It researches, decides, executes. The businesses building agentic workflows now will be 10x more efficient in 12 months.

Book a Discovery Call WhatsApp
In Plain English

What Agentic AI Actually Means

Traditional AI tools wait for you to ask them something. Agentic AI is different — it works independently, following a set of goals you define. It can browse the web, analyse data, write and send emails, update your CRM, generate reports, and trigger other systems — all without a human in the loop.

Think of it as a digital team member who never sleeps. You define the objective and the guardrails. The agent handles the execution — repeatedly, accurately, and at scale. Instead of AI helping one person at a time, a single agent can run dozens of workflows simultaneously.

The companies winning right now aren't using AI as a chat assistant. They're deploying agents to automate entire departments. We design, build, and implement these systems — and measure ROI from day one.

Use Cases

What We Automate

01

Sales Pipeline Automation

Lead scoring, follow-up sequencing, CRM updates, meeting booking, and proposal generation — all automated, all measurable.

02

Marketing Content & Distribution

AI agents that research trends, draft content, schedule posts, monitor performance, and optimise — across every channel, daily.

03

Customer Service & Onboarding

Intelligent agents that handle tier-1 queries, route complex issues, onboard new customers, and escalate with full context when needed.

04

Operations & Reporting

Data aggregation, automated reporting, anomaly detection, supplier communication, and internal workflow orchestration — running 24/7.

The Process

How We Build It

PHASE 1

Audit & Design

We map your existing workflows, identify automation opportunities, and design the agent architecture and integrations.

PHASE 2

Build & Test

We build the agents, connect your tools and data sources, stress test edge cases, and iterate until performance benchmarks are met.

PHASE 3

Deploy

We go live with full documentation, team training, and a phased rollout to ensure adoption and catch any real-world issues fast.

PHASE 4

Monitor & Optimise

We track performance metrics, optimise agent behaviour, and expand workflows as your needs evolve — ongoing support included.

Pricing

Investment & Scope

Fixed-scope projects. No open-ended retainers.

Starter
$5,800 / AED 21,300

One-off project

  • ✓ Single agent workflow design
  • ✓ Build & integration
  • ✓ 30-day post-launch support
  • ✓ Full documentation & handover
Get Started
MOST POPULAR
Growth
$15,500 / AED 56,950

One-off project

  • ✓ Multi-agent system (up to 3 workflows)
  • ✓ Full audit & architecture design
  • ✓ 90-day post-launch support
  • ✓ ROI tracking dashboard
  • ✓ Team training & documentation
⚡ Take Audit
Enterprise
Let's Talk

Custom scope & pricing

  • ✓ Full agentic AI transformation
  • ✓ Cross-department automation
  • ✓ Dedicated project team
  • ✓ Ongoing retainer available
Let's Talk

✓ What's included

  • Workflow design & architecture
  • Build, test & deployment
  • Integration with your existing tools
  • Post-launch support (30 or 90 days)
  • Full documentation & handover
  • ROI tracking dashboard (Growth+)

✗ What's not included

  • Third-party software licences or API costs
  • Ongoing maintenance after support period
  • Custom software development (beyond AI agents)
  • AI strategy advisory (see AI Strategy service)

Need strategy first? Bundle with our AI Strategy & Advisory service.

Frequently Asked Questions

No. We work with your existing tools and stack — whether that's basic CRMs, spreadsheets, or enterprise systems. Part of our process is recommending the right tools where needed. We don't require you to have anything in place beforehand.

A Starter single-agent workflow typically goes live in 3–5 weeks from kickoff. Multi-agent systems (Growth) take 6–10 weeks. Timeline depends on the complexity of your existing systems and how many integrations are required.

We establish baseline metrics before build — time spent on tasks, error rates, conversion rates, cost per action. After deployment we track improvements against those baselines and provide monthly performance reports. Our Growth and Enterprise clients get a dedicated ROI dashboard.

Ready to put AI to work?

Book a free discovery call. We'll identify your best automation opportunity and outline what it would take to build it.
